description_long: This office building features a modern, boxy design with a predominantly white facade and large, floor-to-ceiling glass windows on the front and rear, allowing for ample natural light. The structure appears to have two main floors, with the upper level divided into multiple rooms or offices, each accessible via interior corridors and staircases. The ground floor includes a spacious lobby or open area, visible through the transparent glass panels, and what appears to be a garage or service entrance at the base. The side and rear elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a minimalist aesthetic, emphasizing privacy and security. The building's flat roof and clean lines are characteristic of contemporary commercial architecture, and the use of glass and concrete materials gives it a sleek, professional appearance. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, reinforcing the utilitarian and functional design.
description: A modern, two-story office building with a white facade, expansive glass windows on the front, and a flat roof. The design is minimalist and functional, with clear divisions for offices and a ground-level lobby or garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, interior furnishings, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Rear view with solid white walls, minimal windows, and visible staircases and room divisions on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Alternate front view similar to view 0, highlighting the glass facade and open lobby area.
description_view_3: Side/rear view with a single door, minimal windows, and a mostly solid white exterior.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, full-height glass panels on the front and rear facades; minimal, evenly spaced rectangular windows on the sides.
